---
title: "Fun short scribbles!"
subtitle: "My ponders and takes about life."
listing:
  contents: blogging
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  image-align: right
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
